Welcome

This page has a hamburger menu that looks fine but doesn't work. On mobile, clicking the hamburger does absolutely nothing. The nav stays hidden.

Features

All the things you'd expect. Except a working mobile menu.

Pricing

Free if you only use desktop. Mobile users can't navigate anyway.

Documentation

Comprehensive guides for the three pages you can actually reach.
